---
title: "Harita"
page-layout: full
include-in-header:
  - text: |
      <link rel="stylesheet" href="https://unpkg.com/leaflet@1.9.4/dist/leaflet.css" />
      <link rel="stylesheet" href="/resources/css/site-map.css" />
---

```{=html}
<div class="media-block media-block-map">
<div class="plyr-wrapper">
<div id="site-map"></div>
</div>
</div>

<script src="https://unpkg.com/leaflet@1.9.4/dist/leaflet.js"></script>
<script src="https://unpkg.com/leaflet-rotate@0.2.8/dist/leaflet-rotate-src.js"></script>
<script>
(function() {
  const points = [
    { lat: 37.853272, lon: 40.201844, title: 'Hacı Sait Tek kamerası', description: '', category: 'camera', minZoom: 13, fov: { angle: 90, bearing: 160, radius: 1900 } },
    { lat: 37.836825, lon: 40.200689, title: 'Okul ana kapı kamerası', description: '', category: 'camera', minZoom: 15, fov: { angle: 60, bearing: 210, radius: 30 } },
    { lat: 37.836795, lon: 40.200522, title: 'Okul yan yol kamerası', description: '', category: 'camera', minZoom: 15, fov: { angle: 60, bearing: 160, radius: 30 } },
    { lat: 37.833632, lon: 40.207827, title: 'DARAN-2 kamerası', description: '', category: 'camera', minZoom: 13, fov: { angle: 100, bearing: 255, radius: 800 } },
    { lat: 37.836392, lon: 40.199694, title: "Narin'in evi", description: 'Narin Güran ve ailesinin yaşadığı ev.', category: 'building', minZoom: 15 },
    { lat: 37.836222, lon: 40.200393, title: "Nevzat Bahtiyar'ın evi", description: 'Sanık Nevzat Bahtiyar\'ın evi.', category: 'building', minZoom: 15 },
    { lat: 37.836162, lon: 40.200588, title: "Nevzat'ın annesinin evi", description: 'Nevzat Bahtiyar\'ın annesinin evi.', category: 'building', minZoom: 15 },
    { lat: 37.836259, lon: 40.200541, title: "Nevzat'ın ahırı", description: 'Nevzat Bahtiyar\'ın ahırı.', category: 'building', minZoom: 15 },
    { lat: 37.835643, lon: 40.200317, title: "Kur'an kursu", description: 'Narin ve kuzenlerinin çıktığı kur\'an kursu.', category: 'building', minZoom: 15 },
    { lat: 37.836364, lon: 40.200442, title: 'Patlıcan alanı', description: 'Nevzat Bahtiyar\'ın patlıcan suladığını iddia ettiği yer.', category: 'site', minZoom: 13 },
    { lat: 37.837992, lon: 40.201579, title: "Narin'in mezarı", description: 'Narin Güran\'ın mezarının bulunduğu yer.', category: 'site', minZoom: 15 },
    { lat: 37.847978, lon: 40.204864, title: 'Cenazenin bulunduğu yer', description: 'Narin Güran\'ın cenazesinin bulunduğu yer.', category: 'site' }
  ];

  const makeIcon = (color) => L.icon({
    iconUrl: '/resources/images/markers/marker-icon-2x-' + color + '.png',
    shadowUrl: '/resources/images/markers/marker-shadow.png',
    iconSize: [25, 41],
    iconAnchor: [12, 41],
    popupAnchor: [1, -34],
    tooltipAnchor: [16, -28],
    shadowSize: [41, 41]
  });

  const categoryIcons = {
    camera: makeIcon('green'),
    building: makeIcon('blue'),
    site: makeIcon('orange')
  };

  const map = L.map('site-map', {
    maxZoom: 22,
    rotate: true,
    bearing: 0,
    touchRotate: true,
    shiftKeyRotate: true,
    rotateControl: { closeOnZeroBearing: false }
  });

  // "Diyarbakır" gibi büyük etiketler için yüksek z-index'li pane
  map.createPane('topLabels');
  map.getPane('topLabels').style.zIndex = 650;

  // Zoom-bazlı görünürlük tracking (hem marker'lar hem etiketler için)
  const zoomTracked = [];

  const bing = L.tileLayer('https://ecn.t{s}.tiles.virtualearth.net/tiles/a{q}.jpeg?g=1', {
    attribution: '© Microsoft Bing Maps',
    subdomains: ['0', '1', '2', '3'],
    maxNativeZoom: 19,
    maxZoom: 22
  });
  bing.getTileUrl = function(coords) {
    let q = '';
    for (let i = coords.z; i > 0; i--) {
      let d = 0;
      const m = 1 << (i - 1);
      if (coords.x & m) d++;
      if (coords.y & m) d += 2;
      q += d;
    }
    const s = this.options.subdomains[Math.abs(coords.x + coords.y) % 4];
    return 'https://ecn.t' + s + '.tiles.virtualearth.net/tiles/a' + q + '.jpeg?g=1';
  };

  const esri = L.tileLayer(
    'https://server.arcgisonline.com/ArcGIS/rest/services/World_Imagery/MapServer/tile/{z}/{y}/{x}',
    {
      attribution: 'Tiles © Esri, Maxar, Earthstar Geographics',
      maxNativeZoom: 17,
      maxZoom: 22
    }
  );

  const osm = L.tileLayer('https://{s}.tile.openstreetmap.org/{z}/{x}/{y}.png', {
    attribution: '© OpenStreetMap',
    maxNativeZoom: 19,
    maxZoom: 22
  });

  bing.addTo(map);

  let bingErrorCount = 0;
  bing.on('tileerror', function() {
    bingErrorCount++;
    if (bingErrorCount > 20 && map.hasLayer(bing)) {
      map.removeLayer(bing);
      esri.addTo(map);
      console.warn('Bing tile servisi yanıt vermiyor, Esri\'ye geçildi.');
    }
  });

  const toDMS = (d, axis) => {
    const dir = axis === 'lat' ? (d >= 0 ? 'K' : 'G') : (d >= 0 ? 'D' : 'B');
    const a = Math.abs(d);
    const deg = Math.floor(a);
    const min = Math.floor((a - deg) * 60);
    const sec = ((a - deg) * 3600 - min * 60).toFixed(2);
    return deg + '°' + min + "'" + sec + '"' + dir;
  };

  const categoryLayers = {
    camera: L.layerGroup(),
    building: L.layerGroup(),
    site: L.layerGroup()
  };

  // Great-circle destination — bearing yönünde dist metre uzaklıktaki nokta
  const destinationPoint = (lat, lon, bearingDeg, distMeters) => {
    const R = 6371000;
    const d = distMeters / R;
    const t = bearingDeg * Math.PI / 180;
    const f1 = lat * Math.PI / 180;
    const l1 = lon * Math.PI / 180;
    const f2 = Math.asin(Math.sin(f1) * Math.cos(d) + Math.cos(f1) * Math.sin(d) * Math.cos(t));
    const l2 = l1 + Math.atan2(
      Math.sin(t) * Math.sin(d) * Math.cos(f1),
      Math.cos(d) - Math.sin(f1) * Math.sin(f2)
    );
    return [f2 * 180 / Math.PI, l2 * 180 / Math.PI];
  };

  // Kameranın görüş alanı polygon'u + radius değer etiketi (pasta dilimi)
  const buildFovPolygon = (lat, lon, fov) => {
    const pts = [[lat, lon]];
    const half = fov.angle / 2;
    const steps = 48;
    for (let i = 0; i <= steps; i++) {
      const b = fov.bearing - half + (i / steps) * fov.angle;
      pts.push(destinationPoint(lat, lon, b, fov.radius));
    }
    const polygon = L.polygon(pts, {
      color: '#81c784',
      weight: 1.5,
      fillColor: '#81c784',
      fillOpacity: 0.35,
      interactive: false
    });

    // Radius değer etiketi: sağ kenarın hafif içinde (3° ofset), çizgiye paralel
    const edgeBearing = fov.bearing + fov.angle / 2;
    const labelPos = destinationPoint(lat, lon, edgeBearing - 3, fov.radius * 0.6);
    let rot = ((edgeBearing - 90) % 360 + 360) % 360;
    if (rot > 90 && rot < 270) rot = (rot + 180) % 360;
    if (rot > 180) rot -= 360;
    const label = L.marker(labelPos, {
      icon: L.divIcon({
        className: 'site-map-fov-radius-label',
        html: '<span style="display:inline-block;transform:rotate(' + rot + 'deg)">' + fov.radius + 'm</span>',
        iconSize: [80, 20],
        iconAnchor: [40, 10]
      }),
      interactive: false,
      keyboard: false
    });

    return L.featureGroup([polygon, label]);
  };

  points.forEach(p => {
    const coords = toDMS(p.lat, 'lat') + ', ' + toDMS(p.lon, 'lon');
    const marker = L.marker([p.lat, p.lon], { icon: categoryIcons[p.category] })
      .bindTooltip(p.title)
      .bindPopup('<b>' + p.title + '</b>' + p.description + '<span class="coords">' + coords + '</span>');
    categoryLayers[p.category].addLayer(marker);
    zoomTracked.push({ marker, minZoom: p.minZoom ?? 0, maxZoom: p.maxZoom ?? 22 });

    if (p.fov) {
      const fovPoly = buildFovPolygon(p.lat, p.lon, p.fov);
      marker.on('popupopen', () => fovPoly.addTo(map));
      marker.on('popupclose', () => map.removeLayer(fovPoly));
    }

    // Popup açıkken hover-tooltip'i gizle, popup kapanınca tekrar etkinleştir
    marker.on('popupopen', () => marker.closeTooltip());
  });

  Object.values(categoryLayers).forEach(g => g.addTo(map));

  // Yer adı etiketleri (marker değil, sadece metin)
  // minZoom/maxZoom opsiyonel — verilmezse her zoom seviyesinde görünür
  // large: true → daha büyük puntoyla göster
  const labels = [
    { lat: 37.920268, lon: 40.196915, text: 'Diyarbakır',            large: true },
    { lat: 37.891316, lon: 40.195971, text: 'Diyarbakır havalimanı', minZoom: 11 },
    { lat: 37.833916, lon: 40.199200, text: 'Tavşantepe',            minZoom: 12 },
    { lat: 37.818829, lon: 40.190692, text: 'Batıkarakoç',           minZoom: 13 },
    { lat: 37.839719, lon: 40.232105, text: 'Çarıklı',               minZoom: 13 },
    { lat: 37.874587, lon: 40.174856, text: 'Ağaçgeçit',             minZoom: 13 },
    { lat: 37.838427, lon: 40.173912, text: 'Sarıdallı',             minZoom: 13 },
    { lat: 37.836359, lon: 40.161209, text: 'Tellikaya',             minZoom: 13 },
    { lat: 37.887217, lon: 40.228050, text: 'Ongözlü köprü',         minZoom: 13 },
    { lat: 37.867470, lon: 40.243692, text: 'Dicle',                 minZoom: 13 },
    { lat: 37.847723, lon: 40.207072, text: 'Eğertutmaz deresi',     minZoom: 16, angle: 10 }
  ];

  labels.forEach(l => {
    const innerHtml = l.angle
      ? '<span style="display:inline-block;transform:rotate(' + l.angle + 'deg)">' + l.text + '</span>'
      : l.text;
    const opts = {
      icon: L.divIcon({
        className: 'site-map-label' + (l.large ? ' site-map-label--large' : ''),
        html: innerHtml,
        iconSize: l.large ? [180, 28] : [120, 24],
        iconAnchor: l.large ? [90, 14] : [60, 12]
      }),
      interactive: false,
      keyboard: false
    };
    if (l.large) opts.pane = 'topLabels';
    const marker = L.marker([l.lat, l.lon], opts).addTo(map);
    zoomTracked.push({ marker, minZoom: l.minZoom ?? 0, maxZoom: l.maxZoom ?? 22 });
  });

  const updateZoomVisibility = () => {
    const z = map.getZoom();
    zoomTracked.forEach(({ marker, minZoom, maxZoom }) => {
      const visible = (z >= minZoom && z <= maxZoom);
      const el = marker.getElement();
      const shadow = marker._shadow;
      if (el) el.style.display = visible ? '' : 'none';
      if (shadow) shadow.style.display = visible ? '' : 'none';
    });
  };
  map.on('zoomend', updateZoomVisibility);
  map.on('overlayadd', updateZoomVisibility);
  updateZoomVisibility();

  // "Narin" yolu — Kur'an kursundan ortak çıkış, okul yanında ikiye ayrılma
  const narinLayer = L.layerGroup();
  const narinPathStyle = { color: '#e53935', weight: 4, opacity: 0.7 };

  // Ortak: Kur'an kursu → ayrılma noktası
  L.polyline([
    [37.835643, 40.200317], // Kur'an kursu
    [37.835634, 40.200408],
    [37.835990, 40.200639],
    [37.836092, 40.200754],
    [37.836354, 40.200821],
    [37.836522, 40.200752],
    [37.836630, 40.200631]  // ayrılma noktası
  ], narinPathStyle).addTo(narinLayer);

  // Narin'in dalı
  L.polyline([
    [37.836630, 40.200631],
    [37.836532, 40.200497]
  ], narinPathStyle).addTo(narinLayer);

  // Kuzenlerin dalı
  L.polyline([
    [37.836630, 40.200631],
    [37.836749, 40.200457],
    [37.836952, 40.200092]
  ], narinPathStyle).addTo(narinLayer);

  // Ayrılma noktası — timestamp tooltip
  L.circleMarker([37.836630, 40.200631], {
    radius: 5,
    fillColor: '#fff',
    color: '#e53935',
    weight: 2,
    fillOpacity: 1
  }).bindTooltip('Narin ayrıldı - (15:15:08 Okul kamerası)', { direction: 'top' }).addTo(narinLayer);

  // Narin'in son görüldüğü nokta — okul kamerası
  L.circleMarker([37.836532, 40.200497], {
    radius: 5,
    fillColor: '#fff',
    color: '#e53935',
    weight: 2,
    fillOpacity: 1
  }).bindTooltip('Narin\'in okul kamerasında son görüldüğü nokta - (15:15:21 Okul kamerası)', { direction: 'top' }).addTo(narinLayer);

  narinLayer.addTo(map);

  map.fitBounds(points.map(p => [p.lat, p.lon]), { padding: [40, 40] });

  L.control.scale({ imperial: false, position: 'bottomright' }).addTo(map);

  L.control.layers(
    {
      'Uydu (Bing)': bing,
      'Uydu (Esri)': esri,
      'Sokak (OSM)': osm
    },
    {
      '<span class="cat-swatch cat-swatch--camera"></span>Kameralar': categoryLayers.camera,
      '<span class="cat-swatch cat-swatch--building"></span>Yapılar': categoryLayers.building,
      '<span class="cat-swatch cat-swatch--site"></span>Konumlar': categoryLayers.site,
      '<span class="cat-swatch cat-swatch--narin"></span>Narin': narinLayer
    },
    { collapsed: true, position: 'bottomright' }
  ).addTo(map);

  // Görüntü tarihi göstergesi (Esri World Imagery Metadata servisi)
  const ImageryDateControl = L.Control.extend({
    options: { position: 'bottomleft' },
    onAdd: function() {
      const el = L.DomUtil.create('div', 'site-map-imagery-date');
      el.title = 'Uydu görüntü tarihi';
      el.innerHTML = '<span class="value">…</span>';
      return el;
    }
  });
  new ImageryDateControl().addTo(map);

  const monthsTR = ['Oca','Şub','Mar','Nis','May','Haz','Tem','Ağu','Eyl','Eki','Kas','Ara'];

  const formatImageryDate = (d) => {
    if (d === null || d === undefined) return null;
    const s = String(d).padStart(8, '0');
    if (s.length < 4) return null;
    const year = s.substring(0, 4);
    if (year < '1990' || year > '2100') return null;
    if (s.length >= 6) {
      const m = parseInt(s.substring(4, 6), 10);
      if (m >= 1 && m <= 12) return monthsTR[m - 1] + ' ' + year;
    }
    return year;
  };

  let imageryDateTimer = null;
  const updateImageryDate = async () => {
    const valueEl = document.querySelector('.site-map-imagery-date .value');
    if (!valueEl) return;
    const c = map.getCenter();
    const z = map.getZoom();
    const params = new URLSearchParams({
      geometry: c.lng + ',' + c.lat,
      geometryType: 'esriGeometryPoint',
      inSR: '4326',
      spatialRel: 'esriSpatialRelIntersects',
      outFields: 'SRC_DATE,SRC_RES,MinMapLevel,MaxMapLevel',
      returnGeometry: 'false',
      f: 'json'
    });
    const url = 'https://services.arcgisonline.com/ArcGIS/rest/services/World_Imagery/MapServer/4/query?' + params;
    try {
      const res = await fetch(url);
      if (!res.ok) throw new Error('HTTP ' + res.status);
      const data = await res.json();
      if (data.error) throw new Error(data.error.message || 'API error');
      const features = data.features || [];
      if (features.length === 0) { valueEl.textContent = '—'; return; }
      // Aktif zoom'u kapsayan footprint'i seç; yoksa en yüksek çözünürlüklü
      let best = features.find(f => {
        const a = f.attributes;
        return z >= (a.MinMapLevel ?? 0) && z <= (a.MaxMapLevel ?? 22);
      });
      if (!best) {
        best = features.slice().sort((a, b) =>
          (parseFloat(a.attributes.SRC_RES) || 999) -
          (parseFloat(b.attributes.SRC_RES) || 999)
        )[0];
      }
      valueEl.textContent = formatImageryDate(best.attributes.SRC_DATE) || '—';
    } catch (e) {
      valueEl.textContent = '—';
    }
  };

  map.on('moveend', () => {
    clearTimeout(imageryDateTimer);
    imageryDateTimer = setTimeout(updateImageryDate, 500);
  });
  setTimeout(updateImageryDate, 100);

  // Dev-only: sağ tıkla koordinat al. Yalnızca production domain'i dışında aktif.
  const isDev = !window.location.hostname.includes('narineneoldu.github.io');
  if (isDev) {
    map.on('contextmenu', function(e) {
      e.originalEvent.preventDefault();
      const lat = e.latlng.lat;
      const lon = e.latlng.lng;
      const decimal = lat.toFixed(6) + ', ' + lon.toFixed(6);
      const dms = toDMS(lat, 'lat') + ', ' + toDMS(lon, 'lon');
      L.popup()
        .setLatLng(e.latlng)
        .setContent('<b>Koordinat (dev)</b><code style="display:block;margin-top:4px">' + decimal + '</code><code style="display:block">' + dms + '</code>')
        .openOn(map);
      if (navigator.clipboard) {
        navigator.clipboard.writeText(decimal).catch(() => {});
      }
      console.log('[dev-coord]', decimal, '|', dms);
    });
  }
})();
</script>
```
